title: Why Your "Organic" Honey Is Full Of Pesticides (w/ Eric Mason)

chunks.title: Introduction to Bees and Honey
chunks.summary: The podcast introduces the importance of bees in agriculture and ecosystems. It discusses how bees contribute to our food supply and identifies Eric Mason as the guest, an expert on bee conservation.

We are talking about bees in agriculture. We are talking about bees in ecosystems. We are talking about bees and the future of our planet.
